**Title**: Total Fertility Rate (children per woman)  
**One-line**: Total Fertility Rate — average number of children a woman would bear over her lifetime at current age-specific fertility rates.  
**Source artifact last modified**: 2026-05-16 (auto-generated)

## Definition

Total Fertility Rate — average number of children a woman would bear over her lifetime at current age-specific fertility rates. Replacement level is conventionally 2.1; India's national TFR fell below replacement around 2020. Below-replacement TFR has direct downstream consequences for school-age population, working-age share, dependency ratio, and long-run fiscal pension sustainability — relevant context for `fiscal/state_pension_expenditure_inr_crore`.
